rows.definition: A callback that receives post-softmax attention distributions one (layer, query, head) row at a time for span attribution.
rows.distinction: A pure post-softmax OBSERVER - NOT the accumulator that folds masses and NOT the AttentionIndex metadata for sparse selection.
gaps: attention family not yet written into the concept glossary

rows.definition: The per-turn witnessed post-softmax attention mass a span accumulated during one forward pass, reset at the turn boundary.
rows.distinction: The in-flight per-turn scalar - NOT AttendedMass (the sum across spans) and NOT the EMA/Cumulative reductions.
gaps: attention family not yet written into the concept glossary

rows.definition: The total witnessed attention mass currently attributed across all live segments - the denominator that normalizes each span's attention into [0,1].
rows.distinction: The SUM across spans - NOT Attended (per-span per-turn) and NOT Cumulative (per-span total over time).
gaps: attention family not yet written into the concept glossary

rows.definition: Folds per-turn per-span witnessed attention masses into a recency-decayed EMA and an undecayed cumulative sum, keeping a bounded trajectory ring per span.
rows.distinction: The mutable ACCUMULATOR of masses - NOT Attended (the per-turn scalar it folds) and NOT SpanAttention (the read-only snapshot it returns).
gaps: attention family not yet written into the concept glossary

rows.definition: A read-only snapshot of one span's accumulated attention: EMA (recency-decayed), Cumulative (undecayed), and the bounded Trajectory ring.
rows.distinction: The read-only SNAPSHOT - NOT the mutable AttentionAccumulator and NOT Attended (the in-flight scalar).
gaps: attention family not yet written into the concept glossary

rows.definition: One entry in a span's attention trajectory: the witnessed mass it drew in a specific (1-based, session-global) turn number.
rows.distinction: The (turn, mass) PAIR in a trajectory - NOT Attended (the current per-turn scalar) and NOT the Trajectory ring it lives in.
gaps: attention family not yet written into the concept glossary

rows.definition: Payload-free metadata for a dynamic-sparse-attention (DSA) index artifact, recording binding axes and dependency graph for content-dependent key selection.
rows.distinction: The stored DSA index METADATA - NOT AttentionIndexRequest (the lookup query) and NOT the KV cache (the K/V it sparsely selects from).
gaps: attention family not yet written into the concept glossary

rows.definition: The set of axes a DSA index lookup must match for reuse, with strict causal and exactness requirements for prefix matching.
rows.distinction: The lookup QUERY criteria - NOT AttentionIndex (the candidate being matched) and NOT the index store itself.
gaps: attention family not yet written into the concept glossary

rows.definition: The cache for Gated-DeltaNet linear-attention layers: accumulated recurrent state and a short-conv window per layer, not per-token K/V.
rows.distinction: Recurrent STATE for linear attention - NOT the KV cache (per-token softmax K/V) and NOT the attention accumulator (witness masses).
gaps: attention family not yet written into the concept glossary

rows.definition: Routes one post-softmax attention row onto the segment ledger, attributing each key position's weight to the live span whose cache range owns that position.
rows.distinction: The attribution ACTION (distributes weights to spans) - NOT Attended (the accumulator that receives weight) and NOT AttendedMass (the sum).
gaps: attention family not yet written into the concept glossary
